$comment: Version source-of-truth manifest for kin-model. kin-model holds the canonical Kin types; downstream crates pin it from the 'kin' cargo registry. This file is the DECLARED compatibility contract: each entry is a downstream consumer and the kin-model version requirement it pins. scripts/check-downstream-pins.sh verifies every declared `req` accepts the version this repo is about to publish (the version in Cargo.toml). A breaking (major, or pre-1.0 minor) bump of kin-model MUST update both Cargo.toml AND the affected `req` values here in the same change, which is the explicit signal that those downstream repos must bump and re-smoke. Reading downstream Cargo.toml files seeds these values; this manifest is the authority kin-model CI checks against (kin-model cannot edit downstream repos).
